payload.label: cabinet
payload.short_description: dark brown recessed panel cabinet door
payload.long_description: Partial view of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and narrow frame, smooth finish and vertical orientation; right edge of the door is cropped and an adjacent darker rail is visible, approximately 0.7 m from the camera.
